description: A faithful Codex pet adaptation of a noir mechanical mouse detective with giant round ears, a worn brown leather hat, a weathered blue-gray trench coat, warm glowing mechanical eyes, no tail, and a small vintage pistol.

idle.notes: Alert baseline idle with tiny breathing, steady pistol control, and soft eye-light pulsing.

walk.notes: Short careful patrol walk rows used for movement and true drag-facing behavior.

curious.notes: Suspicious little detective inspect loop with a head tilt and cautious attention.

happy.notes: Restrained pleased gesture with a proud little flourish, still keeping the pistol readable.

sleep.notes: Standing doze with lowered hat, softened posture, and relaxed pistol.

investigate.notes: Independent in-place investigate loop with scanning, listening, and careful micro-motions.

brace.notes: Compact alert brace-and-rise motion stored in the spare jump row.

grumpy.notes: Stubborn irritated slump and recovery kept effect-free and companion-safe.

drag.notes: Directional drag uses the true left-facing and right-facing patrol walk rows.

investigate.notes: The fixed atlas spare running row was intentionally remapped to a dedicated investigate loop.

dragFacingValidation.rule: deltaX < 0 => facing left; deltaX > 0 => facing right
manualVerification: left drag uses a true left-facing strip
right drag uses a true right-facing strip
walk_left and walk_right are not swapped
head, body, coat front, pistol, and gait all face left in running-left
head, body, coat front, pistol, and gait all face right in running-right
giant ears, leather hat, trench coat, glowing eyes, pistol, and tailless silhouette stay readable at small size
no tail appears in any directional row or drag-facing state
